# CMakeLists.txt for mission "Editor Mission"
# Generated by op2-codegen-editor; builds against the classic OP2MissionSDK
# (Outpost2DLL + OP2Helper + HFL). The SDK path is baked in below (absolute
# at generation time) with fallbacks for repo checkouts / manual overrides.
#
# IMPORTANT: MSVC only. The mission links against Outpost2DLL/Lib/Outpost2.lib
# whose C++ imports use MSVC name mangling -- MinGW/Clang cannot link it.
#
# Windows (MSVC):
#     cmake -S . -B build -G "Visual Studio 18 2026" -A Win32
#     cmake --build build --config Release
#     Output: build/Release/cEditorMission.dll

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(Editor_Mission VERSION 1.0.0 LANGUAGES CXX RC DESCRIPTION "OP2MissionSDK mission: Editor Mission")

if(NOT MSVC)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "OP2MissionSDK requires MSVC (Outpost2.lib uses MSVC C++ name mangling). Configure with a Visual Studio generator and -A Win32.")
endif()
if(NOT CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 4)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "Must be a 32-bit (x86) build. Re-configure with -A Win32.")
endif()

# Look for the OP2MissionSDK in order: (1) where the editor that generated
# this project found it, (2) as a sibling of this repo's missions/ folder
# (works for a full `git clone --recursive` checkout), (3) an explicit
# override via -DOP2SDK_DIR=<path>.
find_path(OP2SDK_DIR
  NAMES Outpost2DLL/Outpost2DLL.h
  HINTS "C:/Users/Fefi/Documents/projekte/op2-cpp-poc/OP2MissionSDK"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../OP2MissionSDK"
  DOC "Root directory of the OP2MissionSDK (contains Outpost2DLL/, OP2Helper/, HFL/)")
if(NOT OP2SDK_DIR)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "OP2MissionSDK not found. Re-configure with -DOP2SDK_DIR=<path to OP2MissionSDK>.")
endif()

set(RC_OUTPUT_NAME "cEditorMission")
configure_file(version.rc.in "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/version.rc" @ONLY)

# OP2Helper + HFL werden als Quellcode mit in die Mission kompiliert.
# OP2Helper + HFL are compiled from source into the mission DLL.
file(GLOB OP2HELPER_SOURCES "${OP2SDK_DIR}/OP2Helper/*.cpp")
file(GLOB HFL_SOURCES "${OP2SDK_DIR}/HFL/Source/*.cpp")

add_library(cEditorMission SHARED
  mission.cpp
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/version.rc"
  ${OP2HELPER_SOURCES}
  ${HFL_SOURCES}
  op2_log.hpp
  op2_crash.hpp
)

target_include_directories(cEditorMission PRIVATE
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}"
  "${OP2SDK_DIR}")

target_link_libraries(cEditorMission PRIVATE
  "${OP2SDK_DIR}/Outpost2DLL/Lib/Outpost2.lib")

target_compile_definitions(cEditorMission PRIVATE
  WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
  NOMINMAX
  _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS
  OP2LOG_NAME="cEditorMission")

# /std:c++17 OHNE /permissive-: die klassischen SDK-APIs binden Temporaries
# an non-const Referenzen (LOCATION&, MAP_RECT&) -- das erlaubt nur der
# nicht-strikte MSVC-Modus.
# /std:c++17 WITHOUT /permissive-: the classic SDK APIs bind temporaries to
# non-const references (LOCATION&, MAP_RECT&) -- only MSVC's non-strict mode
# allows that.
target_compile_options(cEditorMission PRIVATE /std:c++17)
set_property(TARGET cEditorMission PROPERTY MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")

set_target_properties(cEditorMission PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "cEditorMission" PREFIX "")
